phrases.en: Leo walked down the busy stairs into the subway station.
phrases.zh: 里奥走下繁忙的楼梯，进入地铁站。

phrases.en: He tapped his transit card on the turnstile reader.
phrases.zh: 他用交通卡在闸机感应器上刷了一下。

phrases.en: The gate beeped and the metal arm swung open.
phrases.zh: 闸机响了一声，金属杆随即打开。

phrases.en: He checked the colorful line map on the wall.
phrases.zh: 他查看了墙上彩色的线路图。

phrases.en: He needed the blue line going downtown.
phrases.zh: 他要坐开往市中心的蓝线。

phrases.en: Leo waited patiently on the crowded platform.
phrases.zh: 里奥在拥挤的站台上耐心等候。

phrases.en: A bright sign showed that the next train was two minutes away.
phrases.zh: 一块亮着的指示牌显示下一班车还有两分钟到。

phrases.en: The train rushed in and stopped behind the safety doors.
phrases.zh: 列车飞驰进站，停在安全门后面。

phrases.en: He stepped carefully over the gap and boarded the right train.
phrases.zh: 他小心地跨过缝隙，登上了正确的列车。

phrases.en: The car was full, so he held on to a metal pole.
phrases.zh: 车厢里很满，所以他抓住了一根金属扶杆。

phrases.en: He listened closely for his stop on the loud speaker.
phrases.zh: 他仔细留意广播里报出他要下的那一站。

phrases.en: When the doors slid open, he stepped out quickly.
phrases.zh: 车门滑开时，他迅速走了出去。

phrases.en: He followed the green signs toward the exit.
phrases.zh: 他顺着绿色的指示牌走向出口。

phrases.en: Finally, Leo tapped his card again and went out through the gate.
phrases.zh: 最后，里奥再次刷卡，穿过闸机走了出去。
